description: Candidate answers the connectivity probe with 'I would use VPN for secure connectivity' — partially correct but thin; no specific auth, no agent alternative mentioned. Remaining probes exist. Should probe for depth. From session 2115a63a turn 433.

judge_input.active_question_text: Using your primary iPaaS, how would you implement a near-real-time order sync from Salesforce to an on-prem ERP?
active_question_positive_evidence: Describes auth and secure connectivity (OAuth 2.0, client credentials, VPN/agent) and network path
active_question_red_flags: Unclear or insecure on-prem connectivity path

active_question_rubric.excellent: Concrete iPaaS components, secure on-prem access with specific auth methods, reliability controls.

judge_input.active_question_evaluation_hint: Verify platform-specific depth and reliability controls.

active_question_signal_metadata.value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

active_question_remaining_probes.2: How would you structure environments and promote changes safely from dev to test to prod?

5+ years hands-on production experience.signal_value: 5+ years hands-on production experience with at least one iPaaS/ESB platform (MuleSoft, TIBCO, or Dell Boomi)

recent_turns.text: What connectivity approach would you use to reach on-prem, and how would you secure it?

judge_input.candidate_utterance: I would use VPN for secure connectivity. We can use VPN or something also, something like an agent.
